description_long: This adult pedestrian is depicted with a striking, stylized clown mask featuring exaggerated facial features and a spiked, mohawk-like hairstyle. The individual wears a short-sleeved, horizontally striped shirt with a bold graphic design on the back, paired with knee-length shorts over fitted leggings. Visible tattoos adorn the right arm, adding to the urban and edgy appearance. Accessories include a gold chain necklace, and the person is wearing white sneakers. The overall look is expressive and theatrical, likely intended to stand out in an urban environment. The figure's posture is assertive, with clenched fists and a wide stance.
description: A masked adult with a spiked mohawk, striped shirt, graphic back, tattoos, gold chain, and white sneakers, standing assertively. The look is urban, bold, and theatrical.
description_view_0: Front view shows the clown mask, spiked mohawk, striped shirt, gold chain, tattoos, and clenched fists.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the mask, hairstyle, shirt stripes, and the person's arm and leg posture.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the large graphic design on the shirt's back, the mohawk from behind, and both arms relaxed at the sides.
description_view_3: Right side view shows the tattooed arm, shirt stripes, and the mohawk's profile, with the figure's stance visible.
attribute_clothing_type: casual short-sleeved shirt with graphic back, knee-length shorts over fitted leggings, gold chain necklace
attribute_posture: standing upright with fists clenched and feet apart
